mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_generated_stories ( USER_ID, CHARACTER_NAME, STORY_TEXT, IMAGE_URL ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{characterName}, #{storyText}, #{imageUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, CHARACTER_NAME, STORY_TEXT, IMAGE_URL, CREATED_AT FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC) AS rn FROM ai_generated_stories ) t WHERE rn = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_generated_story_pages ( AI_STORY_ID, PAGE_NUMBER, CONTENT_TEXT, CONTENT_IMAGE ) VALUES ( #{aiStoryId}, #{pageNumber}, #{contentText}, #{contentImage} )
